qas.q: What is the possible effect of malicious code?
qas.a: Files may be corrupted, erased, or compromised.

qas.q: How should you respond to the theft of your identity?
qas.a: Report the crime to local law enforcement

qas.q: How can you protect yourself from internet hoaxes?
qas.a: Use online sites to confirm or expose potential hoaxes
A type of phishing targeted at senior officials.

qas.q: How can you protect yourself from social engineering?
qas.a: Follow instructions given only by verified personnel

qas.q: Which of the following is true of traveling overseas with a mobile phone?
qas.a: It may be compromised as soon as you exit the plane

qas.q: What is a critical consideration on using cloud-based file sharing and storage applications on your Government-furnished equipment (GFE)?
qas.a: Encrypt any files that you store there (Wrong answer)

qas.q: Which of the following is an example of removable media?
Which of the following is an example of near field communication (NFC)?
qas.a: A smartphone that transmits credit card payment information when held in proximity to a credit card reader

qas.q: Which of the following statements is true of using Internet of Things (IoT) devices in your home?
qas.a: An unsecured IoT device can become an attack vector to any other device on your home network, including your Government laptop
